projectName: Little Dog In The Basket - Vintage
title: Little Dog In The Basket — vintage wind-up repair
description: Vintage Little Dog In The Basket wind-up — clockwork mechanism repair so the puppy pops and moves in the basket again.
itemDetails: "Little Dog In The Basket" is a vintage Japanese mechanical wind-up (clockwork) novelty toy, commonly catalogued as a blue plastic woven-style basket with a fluffy puppy figure that pops up and down and opens and closes its mouth when wound. Typical examples are roughly 19 cm tall with about 10.5 cm basket diameter; many were sold boxed as made-in-Japan shelf toys from the mid–late 20th century, with related puppy-in-basket wind-ups documented from the 1940s through the 1960s onward. Construction is clockwork spring drive with linkages inside the basket base; common failures are broken or slipped springs, worn gears, and seized pivots after decades of storage. Collector interest is modest and nostalgia-driven; working movement and original box improve value. Reference listing: [Carter's — Little dog in the Basket mechanical wind-up](https://www.carters.com.au/index.cfm/item/1536946-little-dog-in-the-basket-mechanical-wind-up-toy-in-original-box/).
